figures.caption: Table 1: Comparison of our scenario-level policy synthesis approach with task-level baselines on the AppWorld normal and challenge test sets. The challenge set includes applications (Gmail, Amazon) not present in the training set.
Figure 2: Cumulative SGC per total debugging iterations on the AppWorld normal (top) and challenge (bottom) test sets.

Figure 1: Dynamic policy-learning architecture with three sections: (1) Policy generation synthesizes policies using task abstraction, component search, and iterative validation; (2) Learning components extracts reusable components from successful policies; (3) Generalizing components consolidates and validates components before storing them in the repository for subsequent use.
